name: Bravura Solutions Limited.
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$2.2407. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
